value: semiosis agent-facing optimization layer (2026-06-21 session 2). TWO CRITICAL CORRECTNESS FIXES found while grounding: (1) AgglomerativeClusterer emitted identical node ids (root, cluster_N) at every octave, so the single-keyed InMemoryStore overwrote every octave with the last -- the Matryoshka octave structure COLLAPSED to one octave. Fixed by prefix-namespacing ids (root@64). Witness: nodes-per-prefix was {1024:7}, now all octaves present. (2) store.knn ranked query embedding against cone APEX (cone-space ~8-dim) not the embedding -- relevance near-noise. Fixed: ConeNode.centroid = embedding-space member mean (prefix-sliced), pipeline populates from cached vecs, store._retrieval_vec prefers centroid; cone math still uses apex. Witness: exact-text recall@1 0.33->1.0. NEW KnowledgeBase surface: typed returns (SearchHit/FlowNeighbor/TensionPair/DeepSearchResult/CompressResult/DiagnoseReport/RetrievalStep), MMR + octave RRF fusion + usage weighting, learning loop (record_outcome/consolidate/diagnose/metrics), save/load continuity, batch_search, explain_retrieval, search_texts back-compat. pipeline incremental ingest via _vec_cache. AgentSettings SC_AGENT__. core/eval.py recall@k+MRR. core/api.py FastAPI agent endpoints + /tools + warmth /ready. docs/agent-guide.md. __init__ exports all. Tests pytest core/ = 144 passed 1 skipped (RandomEncoder; sentence-transformers not installed).
